final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial aerial photograph of the boundary between Amazon rainforest and modern agricultural development.

Style/medium: documentary aerial photography, photorealistic, National Geographic-style environmental storytelling
Composition: high-altitude bird's-eye view, top-down perspective, wide landscape framing capturing the horizon
Subject: stark boundary line dividing two landscapes — dense virgin rainforest with layered canopy and emergent Brazil nut trees on the left; geometric, orderly soybean farmland in varying green-to-yellow growth stages on the right
Scene/backdrop: Amazon rainforest meeting agricultural frontier, clear-cut boundary with visible blackened burn scars and fallen trees, red dirt highway winding through the distance with trucks kicking up red dust
Lighting/mood: natural daylight, neutral color temperature, documentary realism, somber and thought-provoking atmosphere
Color palette: deep forest greens and canopy layers on left, geometric patches of chartreuse to ochre farmland on right, stark black burn scars, rust-red earth and dust
Materials/textures: dense textured rainforest canopy with individual emergent tree crowns, smooth geometric crop rows, charred black earth, dusty red soil
Avoid: oversaturated colors, HDR effects, 8K stuffer language, romanticized beauty, watermark, deformed trees
